hero.body: SaathiAI ek WhatsApp-wala AI saathi hai jo har ITI aur PMKVY graduate ke paas seedha pahunchta hai — unke phone pe, Hindi mein, training khatam hote hi. Koi app download nahi. English ki zaroorat nahi. Koi jhanjhat nahi.

crisis.heading: Yeh numbers dekho — kitna bada problem hai. 😬
crisis.stat1Plain: 4 mein se 3 trained — waste ho gaye yaar.
crisis.stat2Label: Naye log 90 din mein quit kar dete hain
crisis.stat2Plain: Blue-collar attrition — employers ka paisa doob gaya.
crisis.stat3Label: MSMEs bolte hain — sarkari training se kuch nahi mila
crisis.stat4Plain: Almost zero feedback = problem dikhti hi nahi.
crisis.stat5Label: Din — kuch logon ko certificate ka wait karna pada
crisis.stat5Plain: 3+ saal — career start hi nahi ho paya.

impact.eyebrow: Agar sab theek ho jaye toh — numbers dekho
impact.heading: Agar SaathiAI sirf 10% vocational graduates tak pahunche —

cta.heading: Prototype dekhna hai? Chalte hain! 🚀
cta.body: Chaaron cheezein dekho: WhatsApp companion, placement officer dashboard, employer skill card, aur district console.

login.signupBody: Job post karne ke liye Employer ban jao
